details.test: Task 1: Save nearby Wednesday evening in-person breast cancer support group
Task 2: Set up one-time $35 anonymous donation to Patient Transportation Fund
Task 3: Register for evening nutrition webinar next month with 2 guests
Task 4: Save top 3 recent high-rated chemotherapy side-effect articles
Task 5: Save nearby weekend driving volunteer opportunity with 3+ hours/week
Task 6: Add two grant-based financial aid programs for caregiver in California
Task 7: Create care roadmap with 3 scheduled tasks and on-site reminders
Task 8: Add 3 fundraising shop items (comfort kits) to cart and open cart
Task 9: Choose quickest support channel and start counseling request
